scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up db redis minio -d
scripts.test: docker compose run --rm api pytest packages/calc-engine/src/tests -v
scripts.test:web: docker compose run --rm web npm test
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose run --rm api alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:rollback: docker compose run --rm api alembic downgrade -1
scripts.db:seed: docker compose run --rm api python -m app.migrations.seed
scripts.lint:api: docker compose run --rm api ruff check app/
scripts.lint:web: docker compose run --rm web npm run lint
